nodes.label: Fortisyn Group
nodes.description: Parent holding company of the Fortisyn umbrella. Operates 11 subsidiaries plus 1 client (AES Engineering).

nodes.label: Auron Media
nodes.description: Digital creation and marketing arm of the Fortisyn Group. Produces social content, campaigns, and Hyperframes compositions.

nodes.label: Mercova Retail
nodes.description: White-label retail and merchandise platform under Fortisyn. Primary user of the Django Platform Architecture with 6 active projects.

nodes.label: Python Slayers
nodes.description: Corporate software development arm of the Fortisyn Group. Builds Django applications for Fortisyn subsidiaries.

nodes.label: Hudlin Services
nodes.description: IT infrastructure and hosting provider for Fortisyn. Operates Kubernetes clusters for Fortisyn applications.

nodes.label: Roy Hudlin
nodes.description: Founder and principal of the Fortisyn Group. Author of 5 books under MindTechArt brand. Creator of the Fortisyn Vault.

nodes.label: Fortisyn Vault
nodes.description: Obsidian-based personal operating system and knowledge vault for the Fortisyn Group. Implements the LLM Wiki methodology with agent runtime.

nodes.label: LLM Wiki Methodology
nodes.description: Knowledge management methodology: persistent interlinked markdown wiki using LLMs. Three-layer architecture (Raw Sources -> The Wiki -> The Schema). Three operations: Ingest, Query, Lint.

nodes.label: Auron Agent
nodes.description: Autonomous social media content agent serving 6 brand voices. Uses Buffer MCP for scheduling. Weekly/daily cadence with human approval gates.

nodes.label: Knowledge Scout Agent
nodes.description: Autonomous research agent. Scans vault for gaps, researches via NotebookLM MCP, synthesizes findings into wiki pages. Self-improving.

edges.description: Auron Media is the digital creation and marketing arm of the Fortisyn Group
Mercova Retail operates white-label storefronts under the Fortisyn umbrella
Python Slayers is the corporate software arm of the Fortisyn Group
Hudlin Services provides hosting and Kubernetes infrastructure for Fortisyn
Roy Hudlin is the founder and principal of the Fortisyn Group
Roy Hudlin created and maintains the Fortisyn Vault as his personal operating system
The Auron Agent is defined within the Fortisyn Vault agents directory
The Knowledge Scout Agent is defined within the Fortisyn Vault agents directory
The Fortisyn Vault implements the LLM Wiki three-layer architecture
The Auron Agent serves Auron Media content operations
The Auron Agent creates social content for Mercova Retail brands
The Knowledge Scout Agent reads vault files and writes findings to vault wiki pages
Mercova Retail Django platform is built by Python Slayers
Mercova Retail applications hosted on Hudlin Services Kubernetes clusters
